items.question: What is Pet Seal Dance?
items.answer: It’s a Kling o1 video-to-video workflow for creating a cute pet dance meme: keep the original motion/camera, replace the subject, and restyle the scene.

items.question: Do I need to upload a video?
items.answer: Yes. This is a video-to-video workflow. You provide a base clip, then the AI edits it instead of generating motion from scratch.

items.question: What inputs are required?
items.answer: A base video clip, a subject reference image (who/what to replace into the video), and a style reference image.

items.question: Will the motion stay the same?
items.answer: Yes. The goal is to preserve the original motion and camera as much as possible while replacing the subject and style.

items.question: What video length works best?
items.answer: Short clips (5–10 seconds) typically produce more stable results and are ideal for social platforms.

items.question: Can I use it commercially?
items.answer: In general, yes—however, you must have the rights to the base clip and follow provider/platform policies.
